creator: m.viey@wanadoo.fr
text:
I have tried to build a new version from source as documented here https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/cutting-edge/#updating-src-building. 

and I panic when I try to use the new kernel. 

I am on AMD Ryzen 7 5700G. I think I saw something about this in the bug reports..

So, I think I going to open a bug report for that.
